overall.description: Nighttime truck driving simulation on a snow-covered highway during heavy snowfall. The first-person view from inside a Mercedes truck cabin shows the driver navigating through reduced visibility conditions with windshield wipers active. The truck overtakes several vehicles while a 'GARAGE DISCOVERED' game notification appears later in the clip.

agents.ego_description: driving truck steadily on snowy highway following traffic ahead, maintaining lane position

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights occasionally visible

entered.detail: Mercedes truck dashboard with illuminated gauges and controls
navigation screen showing route map mounted on dashboard
windshield covered with heavy snow accumulation, wipers active
metal highway guardrail partially covered in snow
metal highway guardrail with snow banks alongside

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view from inside a truck cabin driving on a snowy highway at night. The dashboard and GPS are illuminated, while heavy snow accumulates on the windshield. The truck follows a car ahead, with guardrails visible on both sides of the multi-lane road.

events.description: truck moves to left lane and overtakes a silver car
passing a blue highway road sign on the right side

agents.ego_description: overtaking slower traffic by moving to the left lane and accelerating past a silver sedan

notable_agents.action: silver sedan being overtaken on the left side, moving slower than ego vehicle

entered.detail: blue overhead highway sign with white text indicating directions

segments.scene_description: The truck executes an overtaking maneuver on the snowy highway, passing a silver car on the left. A blue highway sign appears on the right side as the truck continues driving. The windshield wipers maintain visibility through the heavy snowfall.

events.description: large semi-truck with trailer overtakes on the right side

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed on the highway as a large truck passes on the right

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with white trailer overtaking the ego vehicle on the right

entered.detail: large white trailer truck moving in the right lane

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving as a large semi-truck overtakes on the right side. The highway sign from the previous segment passes out of view behind the vehicle. Snow continues to fall heavily, reducing visibility through the windshield.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with driver looking around cabin

events.description: GARAGE DISCOVERED game notification appears at top center of screen
camera pans left to look out driver side window and side mirror

agents.ego_description: driver looks around the cabin interior and checks side mirrors after garage discovery notification

entered.detail: driver side window showing snowy highway and guardrail outside
left side mirror reflecting the road behind

changed.to: center_near with steering wheel visible during pan

segments.scene_description: A 'GARAGE DISCOVERED' notification appears on screen, prompting the driver to look around the cabin. The camera pans left to show the side window and mirror, then returns to the forward-facing position. The truck continues driving through the heavy snow at night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a truck cabin as it navigates a treacherous, snow-covered highway at night. It begins with the camera focused on the illuminated dashboard and GPS while following a car through heavy snowfall that accumulates on the windshield. As the truck maintains its pace, the view shifts during an overtaking maneuver, gliding past a silver car on the left. The scene then opens up to reveal a blue highway sign on the right, with the windshield wipers continuously clearing the glass to maintain visibility. Finally, the camera continues forward along the multi-lane road, flanked by guardrails under the oppressive winter dark.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a truck cabin as it navigates a snowy highway, shifting from a focus on external traffic to an internal reaction to a game notification. It begins with the vehicle driving through heavy snowfall and reduced visibility, just as a large semi-truck overtakes on the right and a highway sign disappears behind the vehicle. As a Garage Discovered notification appears on the screen, the camera pans away from the road to glance at the side window and mirror. The view then returns to the forward-facing position, settling back into the steady rhythm of driving through the dark, wintery night.
